claim: How-to note: The plan says P2-12 requires installer/ref parity, release manifest with app/data commits and asset SHA, degraded Git-missing mode, installer:verify commands, uninstall:verify, installer:win, release:win --SkipUpload, install-equivalence and release-manifest verifiers included in verify:goal.
